markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Zack Short records 3+ hits in the Chicago C vs New York M professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 22, 2026 at 7:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Zack Short is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Zack Short starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Zack Short is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Zack Short is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Zack Short: 3+ hits?
